name: Instabug Mobile Bug Reporting API
what_it_does: Mobile app testing and observability platform with REST API — providing in-app bug reporting with shake-to-report and screenshot annotation, crash reporting with full session context, performance monitoring (API performance, UI rendering), in-app surveys and NPS for mobile apps, and app review management for iOS and Android.
use_cases: Querying mobile bug reports with attached screenshots and device context via API
Integrating Instabug crash reports with Jira or GitHub for mobile release workflows
Pulling app performance metrics (API call latency, UI frame rates) for dashboards
Managing in-app NPS survey responses for mobile app satisfaction tracking
Automating crash report triage and assignment based on severity and frequency
not_for: Web app bug reporting (Instabug is mobile-native — use Usersnap for web)
Server-side error monitoring (use Sentry or Datadog for backend errors)
Desktop app bug reporting (Instabug supports iOS, Android, React Native, Flutter)
best_when: A mobile app team wants comprehensive in-app bug reporting, crash analytics, and performance monitoring in a single SDK with Jira/GitHub integration and in-app feedback collection for their iOS and Android apps.
avoid_when: You're building a web app, need server-side error monitoring, or don't have iOS/Android apps that can integrate the SDK.

auth.notes: API key from Instabug dashboard. Bearer token auth. App-scoped access (separate key per mobile app). Webhook for bug report and crash events. No OAuth2. Jira, GitHub, Slack, Trello native integrations. Mobile SDK uses app token (separate from REST API key).

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier: 1 app, 3 team members, limited reports
pricing.notes: Egyptian company (Cairo). Founded 2013. YCombinator W14. Raised $30M+. Backed by BECO Capital, Flat6Labs. Africa's largest SaaS success story. Mobile-first differentiator — purpose-built for iOS/Android vs web-first tools adapted for mobile. Shake-to-report gesture is trademark UX. App Performance Monitoring covers network calls and UI rendering. Strong in mobile-heavy tech companies globally.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for bugs, crashes, surveys, and performance data. Bearer token auth. Excellent API documentation. App token in mobile SDK is separate from REST API key. Webhook for report events. Bug reports include full device context, screen recordings, network logs, and console logs. App-scoped access model.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Bug report reads fully idempotent. Crash reads idempotent. Survey reads idempotent. Performance reads idempotent by period.
known_agent_gotchas: Mobile SDK token (app token) different from REST API key — two separate credentials
Bug reports include device screen recordings — large payloads, use presigned URLs
Crash symbolication requires dSYM/mapping file upload to Instabug admin
GDPR: device and user data in bug reports — configure PII redaction in SDK
App-scoped access: separate API key per mobile app in portfolio

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US and EU data residency. Bearer token auth. Mobile bug reports include device state, user session, and network activity — implement PII redaction. Screen recordings may capture sensitive user data — configure field masking. Two credentials to manage: SDK token + REST API key.
